summary: Large game-mode decomp/matching PR centered on src/melee/gm/gm_1BA8.c, with additional cleanup and matching improvements in gm_18A5, gmallstar, gmcamera, gmopening, gmresult, lbbgflash, and sislib. The automated report records 3 new matches, 17 unmatched-item improvements, and 1 gmopening .sdata2 regression.

key_files.role: Primary decomp body work: implements multiple previously stubbed event-mode functions, adds includes for gobjproc and itevyoshiegg, removes some dont_inline pragma blocks, adjusts PAD_STACK, and adds noinline wrapper tactics around small setters.
evidence_refs: changed_files: gm_1BA8.c +690/-20, 13 hunks
diff: /// #gm_801BAC9C replaced by s32 gm_801BAC9C(GameScene*, s32)
diff: /// #gm_801BB758, gm_801BBB64, gm_801BC00C, gm_801BCC9C, gm_801BD028, gm_801BF128 replaced by function bodies
diff: gm_801BC670 signature changed to void gm_801BC670(HSD_GObj* arg0) and PAD_STACK(0x18) to PAD_STACK(0x10)
bot report: gm_1BA8 improvements for gm_801BC00C, gm_801BB758, gm_801BF128, gm_801BCC9C, gm_801BBB64, gm_801BD028, gm_801BAC9C and .sdata2

key_files.role: Header/prototype recovery for functions implemented in gm_1BA8.c.
evidence_refs: changed_files: gm_1BA8.h +5/-5, 2 hunks
diff: gm_801BAC9C, gm_801BBB64, gm_801BC00C, gm_801BC670, gm_801BF128 changed from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to concrete signatures

key_files.role: Matching cleanup in bracket/camera-style game mode code: array indexing replaces cursor pointer in fn_8018A514; float extern aliases replaced by inline literals in fn_8018E46C, fn_80190520, and fn_80190ABC.
evidence_refs: changed_files: gm_18A5.c +48/-59, 10 hunks
diff: src = ((BracketSrcEntry**) ((u8*) entries + 0x3700))[region]
diff: entry->field loop rewritten as entries[i].field assignments
diff: lbl_804DA6A0/lbl_804DA6D4/lbl_804DA6EC/lbl_804DA6F0/lbl_804DA6F4/lbl_804DA6F8 externs removed and replaced by 0.5f, 415.6922f, 537.0f, 149.0f, 409.0f, 47.0f
bot report: fn_8018A514 and fn_80190ABC improved

key_files.role: All-Star mode matching cleanup using base-relative table access, natural loops, and byte-indexed status/color access.
evidence_refs: changed_files: gmallstar.c +25/-56, 7 hunks
diff: gm_801B5624 unrolled copy block replaced by for (i = 0; i < count; i++) chars[i] = opp_data[i].x3
diff: gm_801B59AC and gm_801B5ACC compute index from base-relative gm_803DEBE8 pointer
bot report: gm_801B59AC new match; gm_801B5624 and gm_801B5ACC improved

key_files.role: Camera UI matching: noinline helper wrappers, signed local type changes, for-loop cleanup, switch conversion, and use of HSD_SisLib_803A6530 return value.
evidence_refs: changed_files: gmcamera.c +48/-33, 9 hunks
diff: gmCamera_801A253C wrapped by #pragma dont_inline on/reset and var_r3/var_r6 changed u32 to s32
diff: gmCamera_801A292C do/while cleanup replaced by for loop over three text slots
diff: gmCamera_801A33BC goto ladder replaced by switch(sp10)
diff: gmCamera_801A33BC calls gmCamera_801A2224(HSD_SisLib_803A6530(...), spC)
bot report: gmCamera_801A33BC new match; gmCamera_801A253C and gmCamera_801A292C improved

key_files.role: Implements gm_801A9DD0 and adds static Vec3 constants for CObj/viewport setup.
evidence_refs: changed_files: gmopening.c +43/-1, 1 hunk
diff: /// #gm_801A9DD0 replaced by function body
diff: static const Vec3 gm_803B7D68 and gm_803B7D74 added
bot report: gmopening .rodata new match; gm_801A9DD0 improved; gmopening .sdata2 regressed

key_files.role: Result screen cleanup: noinline wrapper for fn_80174284 and loop conversion of repeated player-standing checks.
evidence_refs: changed_files: gmresult.c +22/-73, 4 hunks
diff: fn_80174284_noinline added and used in gm_80177368_OnEnter
diff: fn_801771C0 repeated check0/check1/check2/check3 goto blocks replaced by for (j = 0; j < 4; j++, q++)
bot report: fn_801771C0 improved

key_files.role: Background flash linkage/signature cleanup: local GXColor definitions added, dont_inline pragma removed, lbBgFlash_80021A10 made non-static.
evidence_refs: changed_files: lbbgflash.c +5/-9, 4 hunks
diff: extern GXColor lbl_804D3840/lbl_804D3844/lbl_804D3848/lbl_804D384C replaced by static GXColor definitions
diff: lbBgFlash_80021A10 changed from static to global void function
changed_files: lbbgflash.h +1/-0, 1 hunk
diff: /* 021A10 */ void lbBgFlash_80021A10(f32); added

key_files.role: Signature/body change so HSD_SisLib_803A6530 returns the copied destination pointer.
evidence_refs: changed_files: sislib.c +2/-2, 1 hunk
diff: HSD_SisLib_803A6530 return type changed from void to u8*
diff: body now returns HSD_SisLib_803A6478(sis_table[dst_idx], sis_table[src_idx])
changed_files: sislib.h +1/-1, 1 hunk
diff: HSD_SisLib_803A6530 prototype changed from void to u8*

what_changed: Implemented several previously stubbed gm_1BA8 event-mode functions: gm_801BAC9C, gm_801BB758, gm_801BBB64, gm_801BC00C, gm_801BCC9C, gm_801BD028, and gm_801BF128.
Recovered gm_1BA8.h prototypes for implemented functions, replacing several UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS declarations.
Converted generated-looking or goto-heavy control flow into loops/switches in gmresult, gmcamera, and gmallstar.
Replaced several address-style float extern aliases in gm_18A5 with inline float literals.
Changed HSD_SisLib_803A6530 to return u8* and used that return value directly in gmcamera.
Made lbBgFlash_80021A10 public via lbbgflash.h so gm_1BA8 can call it.
Automated report recorded matched code +572 bytes, matched data +24 bytes, 3 new matches, 17 improvements, and 1 unmatched-item regression in gmopening .sdata2.

smart_moves.text: Header prototypes were updated alongside newly recovered gm_1BA8 bodies instead of leaving UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS in the public header.
evidence_refs: diff: gm_1BA8.h prototype changes for gm_801BAC9C, gm_801BBB64, gm_801BC00C, gm_801BC670, gm_801BF128

smart_moves.text: The sislib return-type recovery enabled a cleaner call expression in gmcamera instead of requiring a separate destination lookup after HSD_SisLib_803A6530.
evidence_refs: diff: HSD_SisLib_803A6530 returns u8*
diff: gmCamera_801A2224(HSD_SisLib_803A6530(3, 0x15, 0x11), spC)

smart_moves.text: Several repeated generated blocks were replaced by small loops or switch forms, improving reviewability while the bot still reported matching gains.
evidence_refs: diff: fn_801771C0 player-standing checks replaced with for loop
diff: gmCamera_801A33BC goto ladder replaced with switch
diff: gm_801B5624 unrolled copy replaced with for loop
bot report: gmresult, gmcamera, and gmallstar improvements/new match

smart_moves.text: Ordinary float constants in gm_18A5 were kept inline rather than maintained as local extern float aliases.
evidence_refs: diff: lbl_804DA6A0, lbl_804DA6D4, lbl_804DA6EC/F0/F4/F8 externs removed and literal floats inserted

decomp_lessons.lesson: When four player slots or table entries are handled by repeated generated blocks, a natural for loop can be a viable matching/reviewable form.
evidence_refs: diff: fn_801771C0 repeated player checks replaced by for (j = 0; j < 4; j++, q++)
diff: gm_801B5624 copy loop uses for (i = 0; i < count; i++)
diff: gmCamera_801A292C uses for (i = 0; i < 3; i++)

decomp_lessons.lesson: If a callee actually returns a useful destination pointer, recovering that prototype can simplify the caller and improve matching opportunities.
evidence_refs: diff: HSD_SisLib_803A6530 changed from void to u8*
diff: gmCamera_801A33BC passes HSD_SisLib_803A6530 return into gmCamera_801A2224

decomp_lessons.lesson: Inline simple numeric literals instead of preserving address-style extern float aliases when the diff evidence shows those externs were only used as constant values.
evidence_refs: diff: 0.5f, 415.6922f, 149.0f, 537.0f, 47.0f, 409.0f replace lbl_804DA6xx float externs

decomp_lessons.lesson: A focused code-matching PR can still create data-section noise; bot-reported .sdata2 regressions should be carried forward for curator/reviewer awareness rather than treated as resolved.
evidence_refs: bot report: gmopening .sdata2 regression -4 bytes, 50.00% to 40.00%

naming_conventions.convention: Address-style symbol names were retained for unrecovered functions/data, while concrete prototypes and local role names were introduced where bodies provided evidence.
evidence_refs: diff: gm_1BA8.c implemented bodies retain gm_801xxxxx global names but use locals such as ev, exit, stage, kind
diff: gm_1BA8.h replaces UNK_PARAMS with concrete signatures

naming_conventions.convention: Wrapper helpers used an explicit _noinline suffix when introduced to affect call/noinline shape.
evidence_refs: diff: gmresult.c adds fn_80174284_noinline
diff: gmcamera.c adds gmCamera_801A25C8_noinline and gmCamera_801A2650_noinline variants
diff: gm_1BA8.c adds gm_801BEFA4_noinline and gm_801BEFC0_noinline call paths

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use narrowly scoped noinline wrappers or pragma dont_inline on/reset blocks to influence call shape while preserving readable underlying functions.
evidence_refs: diff: gmcamera.c wraps gmCamera_801A253C with #pragma dont_inline on/reset
diff: gmcamera.c adds wrapper chain for gmCamera_801A2650
diff: gmresult.c adds fn_80174284_noinline
diff: gm_1BA8.c adds _noinline wrappers for gm_801BEFA4 and gm_801BEFC0
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: No objdiff transcript is loaded beyond the automated report, so this is intake evidence of tactic use, not a general approval of wrapper chains.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Convert generated branch ladders/gotos into switch statements when branch cases align with source-level dispatch.
evidence_refs: diff: gmCamera_801A33BC goto labels label_11/label_13/label_14 replaced by switch(sp10)
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: The evidence is one caller-specific transformation plus bot-reported new match for gmCamera_801A33BC.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Adjust local signedness to match MAX/comparison behavior.
evidence_refs: diff: gmCamera_801A253C var_r3 and var_r6 changed from u32 to s32 before MAX(var_r3, var_r6)
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: The PR slice does not include author explanation; only the diff and bot improvement support the tactic.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use PAD_STACK only narrowly and adjust its size when needed for a specific function.
evidence_refs: diff: gm_801BC670 PAD_STACK(0x18) changed to PAD_STACK(0x10)
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: No local objdiff proof is loaded for the PAD_STACK change.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Replace pointer-cursor copies with indexed array access when the table base is still semantically important.
evidence_refs: diff: fn_8018A514 removes BracketEntry* entry and writes entries[i].x* fields
diff: src table lookup changed to array-indexed form
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: This is supported as a local cleanup/improvement by diff and bot report, not as a universal rule.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Natural loops can replace repeated player/table generated blocks
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2528 shows repeated player-slot and table-entry blocks being replaced by for loops in fn_801771C0, gm_801B5624, and gmCamera_801A292C, with the bot reporting improvements/new matches in affected units.
evidence_refs: diff: gm_801B5624 for (i = 0; i < count; i++)
diff: gmCamera_801A292C for (i = 0; i < 3; i++)
bot report: affected item improvements/new matches

accepted_candidate_records.title: Recover callee return types when caller matching needs the returned pointer
accepted_candidate_records.text: HSD_SisLib_803A6530 was changed from void to u8* and then used directly as the buffer argument to gmCamera_801A2224 in gmCamera_801A33BC.
evidence_refs: diff: sislib.c and sislib.h HSD_SisLib_803A6530 return u8*
diff: gmCamera_801A2224(HSD_SisLib_803A6530(...), spC)

accepted_candidate_records.title: Narrow noinline wrappers were used as matching tactics
accepted_candidate_records.text: The PR uses explicit _noinline wrapper functions and scoped dont_inline pragma blocks around small functions in gmresult, gmcamera, and gm_1BA8. Treat this as an observed tactic requiring objdiff evidence, not as blanket style.
evidence_refs: diff: fn_80174284_noinline
diff: gmCamera_801A25C8_noinline and gmCamera_801A2650_noinline variants
diff: gm_801BEFA4_noinline and gm_801BEFC0_noinline

source_update_candidates.title: Track unresolved gmopening .sdata2 regression from PR 2528
source_update_candidates.text: The bot report for PR 2528 records one regression in main/melee/gm/gmopening .sdata2: -4 bytes, 50.00% to 40.00%. This should be checked before using PR 2528 as evidence of complete gmopening data improvement.

rejection_notes: Do not infer that every implemented gm_1BA8 function fully matched; the bot report lists percentage improvements, not full matches, for most gm_1BA8 items.

Do not promote noinline wrapper chains, PAD_STACK changes, or pragmas as generally accepted style from this PR alone; the loaded evidence shows usage and aggregate bot improvement but not narrow objdiff justification for each tactic.
Do not infer human reviewer intent or approval rationale; no human review comments are loaded.
Do not treat gmopening data as cleanly improved overall without noting the reported .sdata2 regression.
